rules:
Each step MUST include:

- `spec: string | null`
- `artifact: string`
- `passed: boolean`
- `failures` — same failure shape as single validate (`message`, `artifactId`, optional `path`)
- `warnings: string[]`
- `files: string[]`

API and client packages MUST keep structurally identical DTOs under `dto/validate-batch-result.ts`.

scenarios.name: Client parses batch response
then: ValidateBatchResultDto matches API wire shape field-for-field

scenarios.name: ValidateBatchStepResultDto — primary path
when: Each step MUST include: - spec: string |
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: ValidateBatchStepResultDto — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
